$comment: Puglit's agent network. 'wired' = actually runs in the current build pipeline (true) vs declared-but-not-yet-connected (false). 'model' = the tier each agent uses (premium=deep reasoning/design/code, balanced=standard structured gen, cheap=mechanical). Tiers resolve in lib/openai.ts (MODELS) and are env-overridable (PUGLIT_MODEL_PREMIUM/BALANCED/CHEAP). New agents are appended here at runtime when a capability is missing, then committed so future builds inherit them; build feedback updates an agent's prompt/qualityNotes over time.

models.$note: Provider-agnostic (lib/openai routes through OPENAI_BASE_URL — OpenAI today, self-hosted Gemma/DeepSeek next). Defaults track OpenAI's current frontier; GPT-4 family is legacy.
models.premium: gpt-5.5 — architecture, visual design, page/route code, discovery, stakeholder review

agents.purpose: Adaptive interview (8–14 turns) until 90-95% understanding: vision, users, journeys, DATA + its sources/freshness, edge cases, brand. One question/turn, founder's language, brand color last.
Distills the transcript into the validated answers JSON manifest for the spec/build.
Full Project Master Specification (roles, dataModel, screens incl. view-states, userFlows incl. edge cases, branding palette, monetization) for review before build.
TypeScript types + the single core API endpoint contract (method/path/request/response/auth/gating).
Decides KIND (public vs accounts), the bespoke data model (FK-ordered), API routes and UI pages. The homepage IS the product, never a SaaS landing.
Finds broken journeys (listable-but-not-creatable, chat without scoped send+list, orphan routes/pages) → emits the missing pieces.
One production-grade route handler per API: input validation, correct status codes, parameterized SQL, transaction safety, bare-array lists.
Per-route runtime-fatal audit tsc can't catch: schema conformance, scoping, feed exclusion, mutual-match correctness, Haversine geo, no external deps, bare-array shape.
Bespoke, premium visual identity per product: layout architecture, color tokens (AA contrast), type scale, component recipes, per-screen + view-state composition. Banishes the generic admin look.
One real, interactive, premium page per screen, following the brief + visual bar; defensive rendering, all four view-states, responsive, AA contrast.

Reactive loop: critiques each generated page against the brief + visual bar for CRITICAL defects (contrast, generic layout, missing states) and refines it (max 2 cycles) before it ships. The 'sale feo → sale pulido' fix.
Bespoke app shell/layout for accounts apps (sidebar / top-tabs / full-bleed …) with client auth gate. Different products → different skeletons.
FK-ordered schema, realistic localized catalog seed (relative timestamps for live views), canonical match tables. Plus deterministic auth pages + the queen-bee route integrator (code, not LLM).
Reads real tsc errors from GitHub Actions and applies minimal surgical fixes (no external deps; spine equivalents; App-Router params).

After the queen bee assembles the project, routes it to the 4 specialists, aggregates their honest feedback, hands fixes to the queen, and repeats for up to 3 supervision rounds before the project can reach the user.
Reviews organic-growth + measurability flows: title/meta accuracy & keywords, semantic HTML, internal linking, OG, funnel instrumentation, search-intent copy.
Reviews correctness/security/data-integrity: auth scoping, parameterized + atomic SQL, schema↔route conformance, model gaps that make a feature impossible, status codes, pagination.
Reviews visual quality/UX: AA contrast, brand palette actually applied (no clashing hardcoded hexes), type/spacing hierarchy, all view-states, hover/focus, responsive, layout fit, consistent chrome.
Reviews viability + money path: monetization coherence & wiring (gating/checkout/ads) or value/retention loop if free, legible pricing, trust/legal basics, low friction to value, audience-market fit.

For data-driven products, identifies the REAL external data source (prefers free official APIs, notes free-tier limits + fields) and an ingestion plan; feeds the Data Ingestion agent so the seed mirrors the provider's schema and a cron can pull live data instead of inventing it. Reference impl: promiedos-dac9 app/api/cron/refresh (API-Football, mock fallback).
PLANNED, not yet connected: rubric pass for a11y/performance/security (RLS, headers, rate-limit) across the output, BLOCKING vs ADVISORY. (Design-QC for visuals IS wired; this broader plane is not.)
PARTIAL: CI (tsc) runs automatically; runtime e2e + headless render verification of real journeys is not yet run by the engine (done manually today).
